creator: joseph.scott@owp.csus.edu
text:
On Tue, 17 Jul 2001, Sheldon Hearn wrote:
 
 # 
 # 
 # On Mon, 16 Jul 2001 21:35:28 MST, Joseph Scott wrote:
 # 
 # > -PORTVERSION=	1.25
 # > +PORTVERSION=	1.26
 # 
 # Hi Joseph,
 # 
 # Are you sure no pkg-plist changes are required?
 
 	Short answer, no.  I read through the changelog and it seemed to
 indicate only bugfixes.  So I ran in through a make install and a make
 deinstall and got the expected results.  This of course doesn't cover the
 possibility of missing a file, only that all the plist files listed
 existed.
 
 	So I tried fiddling with different ways to be sure, and I haven't
 come up with one for this port.  I tried 'make install
 LOCALBASE=/usr/local PREFIX=/tmp/port' in an effort to track all of the
 files that the port installs.  This fails during the install because it
 still tries to find apxs in /tmp/port (PREFIX) instead of /usr/local
 (LOCALBASE) where it's installed.
 
 	How do you usually sort this out (the plist stuff) with this
 particular port (or ones like it that depend on items in LOCALBASE, when
 you want to install it to PREFIX)?
 
 -Joseph
